summary: MEMBER LOGIC CARD Verification Complete - All 3 Scripts PASSED. Backend API tests (19/19 pass). UI verified on Desktop (1920x1080), iOS Safari (375x812), and Android Chrome (412x915) viewports.

findings: Mira chat API returns is_emergency=true, pillar='emergency', ticket_type='emergency' for toxic ingestion
Test messages 'dog ate chocolate', 'dog is choking', 'dog vomiting blood' all trigger EMERGENCY mode
Emergency responses include vet contact CTA and WhatsApp helpline
Emergency ticket created (EMG- prefix) for urgent routing
script_a_emergency_suppression.commerce_suppression: Commerce elements not displayed in emergency responses

findings: Balance API: /api/paw-points/balance returns balance=1670, tier info, lifetime_earned
History API: /api/paw-points/history returns transaction ledger with dates and amounts
Catalog API: /api/paw-points/catalog returns available rewards with can_redeem flag
Ways to Earn: /api/paw-points/ways-to-earn returns earning methods
Paw Points History modal shows transaction dates (2/10/2026, 1/25/2026)
Soul questions bank available via /api/pet-soul/questions (8 categories)
Pet Soul profile shows: 38% score, 15 questions answered, 2 achievements
Soul Seeker badge unlocked for Lola (15 questions > threshold of 10)
sync-achievements API is idempotent - second call returns 0 new points
Achievement notification visible: 'Soul Seeker - Lola has reached 25% Soul completion'

ios_safari_375x812.notes: Paw Points, Soul Journey, Achievement notification all visible

android_chrome_412x915.notes: All features render correctly on Android viewport

context_for_next_testing_agent: MEMBER LOGIC CARD implementation fully verified. All 3 scripts (Emergency Suppression, Paw Points, Soul Questions/Badges) working correctly. Backend config in member_logic_config.py correctly drives behavior. 41 unit tests + 19 integration tests all pass.
